question: Write a function that profiles another function and returns execution time, memory delta, and number of allocations. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write a function that generates a flame graph from a profiling run. Show in Python and Go.
Write a function that benchmarks a function by running it N times and reporting p50, p95, p99 latencies. Show in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust.
Write a function that detects memory leaks by comparing heap snapshots before and after an operation. Show in TypeScript and Python.
Write a function that auto-scales a worker pool based on queue depth — adding workers when busy, removing when idle. Show in TypeScript and Python.
